implementation_summary.summary: CP00-646 is production_ready for the RP21 Admin Console domain/service bridge over 150 planned units, preserving no-write, no-real-data, descriptor-only request normalization, tenant/Matter prechecks, permission/audit prechecks, idempotency, lock, persistence, rollback, retry, test, golden-case, Hermes, Claude review, review-hardening prompt/scope correction, and CP647 handoff boundaries without opening Admin Console runtime behavior.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-646 RP21.P01.M08.S06-RP21.P02.M07.S06 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

invalid_review_attempts.reason: Syntactically valid raw review was not accepted as closeout evidence because normalized receipt had closeout_eligible=false and parsed_review.blocks_goal_closeout=true.
